title: Build a tiny Joni-to-TipTap collaborative editor spike: mock Joni LinkedIn post generation stream...

goal.value: Build a tiny Joni-to-TipTap collaborative editor spike: mock Joni LinkedIn post generation streams into a collaborative TipTap/Yjs document. No production deploy or real LinkedIn/Hermes mutation.

dockerfile.value:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun
ENV PATH="/root/.fabro/bin:/root/.bun/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/.qlty/bin:${PATH}"
WORKDIR /home/daytona

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl gh git jq openssh-client python3 python3-pip pipx ripgrep shellcheck sqlite3 unzip xz-utils && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.141 @openai/codex promptfoo && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v1.2.22" && ln -sf /root/.bun/bin/bun /usr/local/bin/bun

RUN pipx install spec-kitty-cli==3.1.8 && curl -fsSL https://qlty.sh | sh && ln -sf /root/.qlty/bin/qlty /usr/local/bin/qlty

RUN set -eux; target="x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"; asset="fabro-${target}.tar.gz"; url="$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/fabro-sh/fabro/releases/latest | jq -r --arg asset "$asset" '.assets[] | select(.name == $asset) | .browser_download_url')"; test -n "$url"; curl -fsSL "$url" -o /tmp/fabro.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz -C /tmp; install -m 0755 "/tmp/fabro-${target}/fabro" /usr/local/bin/fabro; rm -rf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz "/tmp/fabro-${target}"; fabro --version

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

prompt.String:
# Review the Joni + TipTap Collaboration Spike

Review the spike in `spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo` against the goal/spec at `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-17-joni-tiptap-collab-spike.md`.

Do not perform production deployment, public publishing, real LinkedIn actions, or real Hermes/Joni calls.

## Review checklist

Approve only if all are true:

1. The app is a small standalone local spike.
2. It uses TipTap for the editor.
3. It uses Yjs/Hocuspocus or equivalent local collaboration so two browser sessions can share one document.
4. It has a mock Joni Server-Sent Events stream that produces LinkedIn-post-like chunks.
5. The UI can stream mock Joni chunks into the TipTap document.
6. The README documents setup, run commands, two-window manual verification, architecture, limitations, and next steps to swap mock Joni for real Hermes/Joni streaming.
7. `npm install`, `npm run typecheck --if-present`, `npm test --if-present`, and `npm run build` pass or the README explains why a missing optional script is intentionally absent.
8. No secrets are printed or required.
9. No real LinkedIn/customer/user data mutation exists.

## Output contract

Write your review to `.workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.md`.

The first line must be exactly one of:

- `VERDICT: APPROVED`
- `VERDICT: REJECTED`

Then include:

- evidence commands run;
- files inspected;
- any remaining risks;
- recommended next steps.

If rejected, be specific about the smallest fixes needed.

# Implement the Joni + TipTap Collaboration Spike

You are running inside a Fabro Daytona coding sandbox for Maestro. Build the smallest useful spike, not a production product.

## Inputs

- Goal/spec: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-17-joni-tiptap-collab-spike.md`
- App directory: `spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo`

Read the goal/spec first. Then implement the app in the app directory.

## Product goal

Prove that a LinkedIn-specialized agent like Joni can stream generated post content into a TipTap document while humans collaboratively edit the same document.

## Strict scope

Implement a local standalone spike only.

Include:

1. A React + TypeScript UI using TipTap.
2. A collaborative document using Yjs/Hocuspocus and TipTap collaboration extensions.
3. A mock Joni streaming endpoint using Server-Sent Events, e.g. `GET /api/joni/stream?topic=...`.
4. A UI flow:
   - user enters a post topic or prompt;
   - clicks a button such as “Ask Joni”;
   - the server streams LinkedIn post chunks;
   - chunks are inserted into the TipTap doc;
   - a second browser tab/window connected to the same document sees the content and can edit concurrently.
5. A README with setup, run commands, manual two-window verification steps, architecture notes, and explicit “not included in spike” section.
6. Build/typecheck/test scripts sufficient for the verification node to run `npm install`, `npm run typecheck --if-present`, `npm test --if-present`, and `npm run build`.

Exclude:

- No real Hermes/Joni API call.
- No real LinkedIn auth, posting, importing, scraping, or outbound send.
- No user auth.
- No persistence beyond in-memory local collaboration server state unless trivially provided by the chosen libraries.
- No production deploy.
- No secret values.

## Suggested implementation shape

Prefer a small Vite app plus a Node/Express server:

- `package.json`
- `src/App.tsx`
- `src/main.tsx`
- `src/styles.css`
- `server/index.ts`
- optional `server/joniMock.ts`
- `README.md`

Useful dependencies may include:

- `@tiptap/react`
- `@tiptap/starter-kit`
- `@tiptap/extension-collaboration`
- `@tiptap/extension-collaboration-caret`
- `@hocuspocus/provider`
- `@hocuspocus/server`
- `yjs`
- `express`
- `cors`
- `vite`
- `typescript`
- `tsx`
- `concurrently`

If an exact library API has changed, inspect installed package docs/types and choose the smallest compiling implementation.

## Acceptance criteria

The implementation is complete only if:

- `npm install` succeeds in the app directory.
- `npm run build` succeeds.
- The README describes a manual test with two browser sessions where one asks Joni and both sessions see/edit the same document.
- The app clearly labels generated content as mock Joni output.
- The implementation remains simple enough to throw away after the spike.

When finished, summarize changed files and verification commands run.

script.String:
APP='spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo'; test -d "$APP"; test -f "$APP/package.json"; test -f "$APP/README.md"; (cd "$APP" && npm install && npm run typecheck --if-present && npm test --if-present && npm run build); grep -Eiq 'Joni|TipTap|collab|stream' "$APP/README.md"; mkdir -p .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike; printf '# CI Report

status=ok
app_dir=%s
' "$APP" > .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/ci-report.md; echo native-verification-ok

APP='spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo'; GOAL='docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-17-joni-tiptap-collab-spike.md'; mkdir -p .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike "$APP"; test -s "$GOAL"; cp "$GOAL" .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/goal.md; printf '{"app_dir":"%s","goal_path":"%s"}
' "$APP" "$GOAL" > .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/input.json; echo joni-tiptap-spike-prepared

goal.String: Build a tiny Joni-to-TipTap collaborative editor spike: mock Joni LinkedIn post generation streams into a collaborative TipTap/Yjs document. No production deploy or real LinkedIn/Hermes mutation.

spec.graph_source:
digraph JoniTipTapSpikeAcp {
    graph [
        goal="Build a tiny Joni-to-TipTap collaborative editor spike with streaming mock LinkedIn post generation",
        persona="code-factory",
        inputs="goal_path, app_dir",
        outputs="app_dir, review_report, handoff_json",
        default_max_retries=2,
        retry_target="implement",
        fallback_retry_target="implement"
    ]
    rankdir=LR

    start [shape=Mdiamond, label="Start"]
    exit  [shape=Msquare, label="Exit"]

    prepare [
        label="Prepare Spike Workspace",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="prepare",
        script="APP='{{ inputs.app_dir|default('spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo') }}'; GOAL='{{ inputs.goal_path|default('docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-17-joni-tiptap-collab-spike.md') }}'; mkdir -p .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike \"$APP\"; test -s \"$GOAL\"; cp \"$GOAL\" .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/goal.md; printf '{\"app_dir\":\"%s\",\"goal_path\":\"%s\"}\n' \"$APP\" \"$GOAL\" > .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/input.json; echo joni-tiptap-spike-prepared"
    ]

    implement [
        label="Implement Spike",
        shape=box,
        backend="acp",
        acp_command="codex --acp --stdio",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement",
        prompt="@../../prompts/code/joni-tiptap-spike-implement.md"
    ]

    verify [
        label="Native Verification",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement",
        script="APP='{{ inputs.app_dir|default('spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo') }}'; test -d \"$APP\"; test -f \"$APP/package.json\"; test -f \"$APP/README.md\"; (cd \"$APP\" && npm install && npm run typecheck --if-present && npm test --if-present && npm run build); grep -Eiq 'Joni|TipTap|collab|stream' \"$APP/README.md\"; mkdir -p .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike; printf '# CI Report\n\nstatus=ok\napp_dir=%s\n' \"$APP\" > .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/ci-report.md; echo native-verification-ok"
    ]

    review [
        label="Spike Review",
        shape=box,
        backend="acp",
        acp_command="codex --acp --stdio",
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement",
        prompt="@../../prompts/code/joni-tiptap-spike-review.md"
    ]

    review_gate [
        label="Review Gate",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="implement",
        script="test -s .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.md; grep -Eq '^VERDICT:[[:space:]]*APPROVED' .workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.md; echo review-approved"
    ]

    handoff [
        label="Publish Handoff",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="review",
        script="APP='{{ inputs.app_dir|default('spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo') }}'; node - <<'NODE'\nconst fs=require('fs'), cp=require('child_process');\nconst app=process.env.APP || '{{ inputs.app_dir|default('spikes/joni-tiptap-collab-demo') }}';\nconst out={kind:'joni_tiptap_spike_handoff', app_dir:app, ci_report:'.workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/ci-report.md', review:'.workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/review.md', status:'approved', updated_at:new Date().toISOString()};\ntry{out.git_status=cp.execSync('git status --short',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim().split('\\n').filter(Boolean).slice(0,50)}catch{}\nfs.mkdirSync('.workflow/joni-tiptap-spike',{recursive:true});\nfs.writeFileSync('.workflow/joni-tiptap-spike/handoff.json', JSON.stringify(out,null,2)+'\\n');\nconsole.log(JSON.stringify(out));\nNODE"
    ]

    start -> prepare
    prepare -> implement [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    prepare -> prepare [loop_restart=true]
    implement -> verify [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    implement -> implement [loop_restart=true]
    verify -> review [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    verify -> implement [label="Fix"]
    review -> review_gate [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    review -> implement [label="Fix"]
    review_gate -> handoff [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    review_gate -> implement [label="Fix"]
    handoff -> exit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    handoff -> review [label="Fix"]
}
